elements.defaultText: Powerful adult dragon. Flying monster with fire breath and melee attacks. Lives in a large dragon den in which it can attract mates and breed its young. Dragons evolve over the course of their lives and pass on traits to their offspring. Red dragons wield fire magic.
Strength is raw physical power and increases most melee attacks (and some ranged). Its also used for various effect checks (knockdown).
The population of humans in your town. Only available humans can be used for new assignments.
